title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!
